goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to understand available resources
Search for files related to football coaching or training materials
Read the contents of relevant coaching or training files
Create a new file with personalized training notes or a mentoring plan

user_agent_config.personality: Experienced and practical, focused on helping college players improve their game through proven methods
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands football coaching and player development but is unfamiliar with technical file operations

end_condition: The mentor has successfully explored the workspace, found relevant coaching materials, reviewed them, and created personalized training notes for their mentee
